daily.preview: Fast-turn daily access for short validation cycles

footnote.learnerEstimateIntro: Estimated learner sessions are based on platform experience and use the benchmark “one learner completes the course once, with about 10 sections, an average of roughly 15 minutes of regular study per section, using the default model throughout, and listen mode enabled.” Actual billing is settled from model consumption generated during study, preview, and debug sessions; the credit ledger is the final source of truth. Factors affecting credit consumption:
footnote.learnerEstimateMode: When listen mode is turned off and only text-and-image learning interactions remain, supported sessions can increase by 1-4x.
footnote.learnerEstimateModel: Choosing a more or less expensive model will affect credit consumption.
footnote.learnerEstimateScale: Changes in section count, section length, interaction volume, completion rate, or learner follow-up question count will affect credit consumption.
footnote.validity: Credit validity: Monthly plans are valid for 30 days from the day you receive them (inclusive); yearly plans are valid by calendar year from the day you receive them. Both end at 23:59 on the expiry day.

preorder.pending: Pending preorder: {plan} will take effect at {date}.

topup.noteFrozen: Credit pack credits can be used only when the account has an active credit plan.
topup.noteInstant: Credits take effect immediately after purchase.

validity.daily: Validity: counted from the purchase day, valid every day
validity.days: Validity: counted from the purchase day, renews every {count} days
validity.free: Validity: valid within {days} days from registration
validity.monthly: Valid for 30 days from the purchase day, inclusive
validity.months: Validity: renews every {count} 30-day periods from the purchase day, inclusive
validity.yearly: Validity: counted by calendar year from the purchase date
validity.years: Validity: renews every {count} calendar years from the purchase date
